textByHash.256dc1ef756bfa45594d53b18c827c4eae8c23d2: Just complete the tasks in Ardougne so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.366bb55e9334abcd353d60011189d744f51a7ae4: Well, there are four different Ardougne cloaks, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to
textByHash.52f1a0efe635075aa045d5c1c60d324c6761d8bb: In addition to the easy rewards: Wizard Cromperty will give you 100 noted pure essence each day, even more drops will be noted in the Tower of Life, you've got a 10% better chance at pickpocketing in Ardougne, you
textByHash.569a5bb7b78d29a3b6b9373f325534410bab1256: I've upgraded your Ardougne cloak for you. Wizard Cromperty will give you 100 noted pure essence each day, even more drops will be noted in the Tower of Life, you've got a 10% better chance at pickpocketing in
textByHash.5723a112ee336f6e83eb0e900d98b000363112d1: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In and around Ardougne it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.
textByHash.58e0c065bbb6f05f93360954dc32e63f4dc46b63: This cloak is a symbol of your exploration of Ardougne. The Citizen in West Ardougne will buy cats for 200 death runes each, some drops in the Tower of Life will be noted and the cape can teleport you to the
textByHash.6555218e5d197fa981e61ddd403710aad3aac43c: They call me Two pints... I'm the taskmaster for the Ardougne Achievement Diary.
textByHash.704cf2c7b6718049deef76854da0a181ddc3063b: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Ardougne! Here's your reward!
textByHash.8a7824d464264b9789f6622e80fef7d1484ff8fe: If you ever lose your cloak, come back to me to reclaim it.
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.a235126158c0d5760d1e2ad204e960014f498bfa: What, with your stats? I don't believe you. You'd need a Smithing level of 91. Ask me again when you've got your Smithing level up.
textByHash.b9075fbd05ac1bbedcbc2461db297340db8f8a30: I've upgraded your Ardougne cloak for you. Wizard Cromperty will give you 150 pure essence each day, you can toggle the Watchtower teleport to the centre of Yanille, claim further drops as notes in the Tower of
textByHash.bcb18e160a478d3f2c373129020f1e164f65a92e: In addition to the easy and medium benefits: Wizard Cromperty will give you 150 pure essence each day, you can toggle the Watchtower teleport to the centre of Yanille, claim further drops as notes in the Tower of
textByHash.c1e4955816c98a3ee8207a4976168e12f969d7ed: can toggle the ring of life to teleport to Ardougne, you get three teleports each day to the Ardougne farming patch and you can hold up to 56 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.
textByHash.c925e480275efbd0e082cf28cfb3e156ceab7c49: I'm not too sure really... my memory isn't the greatest...
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.cd3d1ea2a77fcb5edd1a343e51c04e9e4d91ff6f: Ardougne, you can toggle the ring of life to teleport to Ardougne, you get three teleports each day to the Ardougne farming patch and you can hold up to 56 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.
textByHash.e3f4f48cdb584c704746d7b248cc3fa49af1ec0b: Life, teleports to the farming patch increased to five per day, have a 10% better chance at pickpocketing everywhere and you can hold up to 84 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.
textByHash.eb4381935aca12f79c496d33c6ffd78bef138aca: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Ardougne: The Citizen in West Ardougne will buy cats for 200 death runes each, some drops in the Tower of Life will be noted and the cape can teleport you to the Monastery
textByHash.f31292ada8c7d26681b7275bcd373b4ac9172360: I've upgraded your Ardougne cloak for you. Wizard Cromperty will give you 250 pure essence every day, you will catch 50% more fish from the Fishing Trawler and receive 25% more marks of grace on the
textByHash.f5872f49cef5786ffa98d51156dc031ee79f78bd: Ardougne agility course. Your cape will have unlimited teleports to the Ardougne farming patch, Bert will automatically deliver your daily sand and you can hold up to 140 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.
textByHash.fa7380e203a2c969a91a27cd459a4b4a64e981c2: Perhaps... I know a great drinking game for that!
